PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-18-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joshua West (via court call) for (petitioner) Donna Lott.

The Court stated that there does not appear to be objections, that this is the second amended petition and that it will be granted, that it is waiving the defect that notice was mailed prior to the petition being filed explaining that rules of court require the document to be filed prior to notice being sent and that a status on the close of the estate will be set for January 24, 2018. Mr. West stated that they may have issues with the real property being sold but that they have a buyer ready. The Court granted the petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-11-2016 Continued To Jul-18-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-27-2016 Continued To Jul-11-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-06-2016 Continued To Jun-27-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-09-2016 Continued To Jun-06-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joshua West (via court call) for (petitioner) Donna Lott.

The Court asked if one of the witnesses will sign a declaration regarding what they signed on December 24th or if an amendment will be necessary. Mr. West stated that he can get a declaration and file it, that it was signed on 12/25, that the will was dated 12/24 but the witnesses signed on 12/25 and asked for a 3 week continuance. The petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary was continued to June 6, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and will be deemed submitted pending the filing of the declaration.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-06-2016 Continued To May-09-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
